title: Knowledge and Evidence Specialists: UKHSA Knowledge and Library Services
body: "Knowledge and Evidence Specialists are your first point of contact for identifying and retrieving the latest and most relevant evidence, quality assessment of evidence, and training in information, digital and health literacy.  Contact your relevant Knowledge and Evidence Specialist by selecting their name from the list below.  Chief Scientific Officer (CSO) directorates and their Knowledge and Evidence Specialists     Directorate Knowledge and Evidence Specialists     Public Health Microbiology  Michael.Cook@ukhsa.gov.uk, James.Robinson@ukhsa.gov.uk    Radiation, Climate, Chemical, Climate and Environmental Hazards  Michael.Cook@ukhsa.gov.uk, James.Robinson@ukhsa.gov.uk    Scientific Strategy and Evidence  Michael.Cook@ukhsa.gov.uk, James.Robinson@ukhsa.gov.uk      Chief Medical Advisor Group (CMA) directorates and their Knowledge and Evidence Specialists     Directorate Knowledge and Evidence This is a new service. Help us improve it by providing feedback.  "
